description_long: This object is a pixelated sword with a distinctly blocky, geometric design reminiscent of the style found in the game Minecraft. The blade is composed of a series of square segments in varying shades of blue, transitioning from lighter blue at the tip to darker blue near the hilt. The handle is shorter and features a crossguard, with the grip area rendered in deep blue and purple hues, giving it a stylized, digital appearance. The crossguard is blocky and extends perpendicularly from the handle, providing a clear separation between the blade and grip. The entire object has a matte, non-reflective finish, with no visible engravings or decorative elements. The sword appears to be made entirely of a single material, likely a stylized representation of metal or crystal.
description: A pixelated, blocky sword with a blue gradient blade and a dark blue-purple handle, styled after Minecraft. The design is geometric, with a matte finish and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from an angle highlighting the blade's blue gradient and the blocky crossguard.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length of the blade and the symmetry of the handle and crossguard.
description_view_2: The blade's pixelated segments and the transition from light to dark blue are most visible here.
description_view_3: The handle and crossguard are prominent, with the blade extending away and the color gradient visible.
attribute_handle_design: blocky, straight, dark blue and purple, no visible grip texture
